title: Is there a worksheet.view showFormulaBar?
author: censys-git
body: I see there are boolean properties for the worksheet view for showGridLines, showRowColHeaders, and showRulers. What about showFormulaBar? Does it exist/work?

comments.author: censys-git
comments.body: @Alanscut Thanks, but I was asking in terms of the exceljs object worksheet "view" and whether the property is supported (which may be showFormulas not showFormulaBar). Are you referring me to the link to say that all of the properties listed are in fact supported by exceljs as well?
